goal: Complete the CLI with all remaining commands
approach: Added 7 new commands: init (standalone repo setup), show (display intent by ID), search (keyword search across intents), cost (token usage aggregation by model), diff (show intents for changed files), parent start/end/show (multi-session parent intent management), teardown (clean removal from Claude config). Expanded integration tests from 13 to 27.

alternatives.option: Ship with just the 5 core commands
alternatives.rejected_because: User wanted the complete tool, not a phased rollout
